items.title: The not-quite-dying art of the slice
items.summary: Slower conditions, new string technology and heavier tennis balls have made slices less common on the court. But they can still be a huge weapon.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Sources: Utd, Chelsea agree $67M deal for Santos
items.summary: Manchester United have agreed a deal with Chelsea for midfielder Andrey Santos, sources have told ESPN.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: 2026 MLB All-Star Game: Full rosters unveiled as Phillies, Dodgers, Braves lead selections
items.summary: The AL and NL squads, including starters, were unveiled ahead of the July 14 Midsummer Classic in Philadelphia
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
